case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1110 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 25.03.2025 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General along with SIP Dhani Bux Bhutto >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the petitioner submits that grievance of the petitioner has been redressed, therefore, under instructions he does not press instant Petition. Accordingly, instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
